name: The Forgotten Apartment
short_description: A psychological horror experience set in a forgotten apartment filled with dark memories, eerie puzzles, and emotional scars waiting to resurface.
detailed_description:
"Ready to face the horrors of the night?"

Story
Jacob, a security guard, goes to an apartment building that was abandoned years ago after a complaint from neighbors. The neighbors complain about strange noises coming from the apartment. Jacob enters the apartment to investigate the scene, but someone locks the door on him. Our character starts looking for a way out and starts to experience paranormal events inside. He sees that the door of an apartment is open and enters, but is locked inside again. At this point, Jacob realizes that something is going on in the apartment and continues his investigations. He learns that a family has disappeared from the apartment. Jacob's wife Sophie died in a traffic accident 10 years ago.

The Forgotten Apartment

"The echoes of the past still whisper through the walls..."

In an abandoned apartment, what awaits you in the dark corners?

The Forgotten Apartment offers a short yet intense experience built on forgotten memories, psychological tension, and repressed fears.
This is not a walking simulator—this is an awakening.

Features:

  • Intense Atmosphere – Every room whispers a dark secret.

  • Cleverly Designed Puzzles – Piece together the past to recover your lost memory.

  • A One-Hour Cinematic Experience – Short but unforgettable.

  • High-Quality Graphics & Sound Design – Every detail is crafted to pull you in.

The past hasn’t forgotten you.
Are you ready to face it?

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
